name: wiki-markdown
description: Markdown-backed AI-native filesystem wiki management and agent policy scaffolding for AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Manage an AI-native project wiki backed by markdown files.
interface.longDescription: Initializes, reads, writes, retires, completes/reopens, and validates a markdown-backed wiki under wiki/ for project SSOTs, runbooks, intents, decisions, rejected alternatives, trial-error records, observations, and task bridge nodes. Also scaffolds concise auto-loaded agent operating policy blocks into CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md without writing policy into consumer wiki vaults.
defaultPrompt: Use $wiki once at task bootstrap when durable design or policy context is relevant, then reuse that context.
For a concrete runtime defect, inspect code and runtime evidence first instead of repeatedly recalling the wiki.
Use $wiki to capture this decision and refresh indexes.
Use $agent-policy to scaffold Claude/Codex operating policy files.
